item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: There will be a debate team meeting today at 10:35 in Rm.209

item.title: A message from Mr. Vonesch:
item.description: We are offering the sacrament of confession for students and staff tomorrow. Grade 7/8 teachers - please check the schedule sent by Mr. Vonesch. Confessions will be open to high school students and staff members during period 3 tomorrow. If you would like to go to confessions but have been unable to because of scheduling, please see Mr. Vonesch. Thank you!

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: This message is for all students who pre ordered a beavertail. The buytown beavertail truck will be here to deliver the tasty treats. All high school students who pre ordered a beavertail are to come to the main foyer after period #1 to collect their beavertail. All grade 7/8 students will have their delivered to their class after the morning break.
